nasb.text: But while his men were sleeping, his enemy came and sowed tares among the wheat, and went away.

esv.text: but while his men were sleeping, his enemy came and sowed weeds  among the wheat and went away.

cnv.text: 人們睡了的時候，他的仇敵來把稗子撒在麥子中間，就走了。

ccb.text: 人们睡觉的时候，仇敌过来把毒麦撒在他的麦田里，就走了。

csbs.text: 但是当人们睡觉的时候，他的仇敌来把稗子撒在麦子中间，然后离开了。
